customAttributes.description:
Back in My Day!

Breath of Fury can enchant only a creature you control.
When enchanted creature successfully deals combat damage to a player, sacrifice it. Unless that was the last creature you controlled, instead of discarding Breath of Fury, attach it to another creature you control. If you do, untap all creatures you control and after this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair Chaos Vault: Back in My Day! and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 5/15/2026 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
